resume_text:
Professional Summary
Product Manager with a track record in leading next-gen networking technologies, driven by a passion for
connecting market insights to shape new business possibilities. Adept at bridging technical insights with
market research to identify growth opportunities and drive product success through cross-functional collaboration.

Professional Experience
Product Manager – Advanced Industrial Ethernet Switch, Moxa Inc. 10/2022 – Present | New Taipei, Taiwan
•
Led SPE/ APL product roadmaps from concept to launch by synthesizing market and technology assessments.
•
Uncovered strategic market insights via field research and industry engagement to guide competitive positioning.
•
Accelerated market adoption by marketing initiatives, including white papers, web portals, and global events.
•
Managed full product lifecycles through cross-functional coordination with R&D and sales teams.

Marketing Intern - English Tutorial App, Avance Venture Lab •10/2020 – 01/2021 | Remote, Taiwan
Promoted campaigns on Facebook and Dcard, resulting in 300+ sign-ups.
•
Led LINE program and designed interactive chat content targeting parents and children.

Marketing Project (Business Course), The Base Coffee Shop 09/2019 – 01/2020 | Chiayi, Taiwan
•
Co-designed a marketing plan in a hands-on course; increased monthly sales by 81% and revenue by 10%.

Education
Exchange Program in GBBA & MIM, NEOMA Business School 09/2021 – 06/2022 | Rouen, France
•
[Entrepreneurship Project] Designed Anti-Loss AirPods Tracker, earning top score for this strategic pitch.
Bachelor of Finance, National Chung Cheng University 09/2017 – 06/2022 | Chiayi, Taiwan
•
[Programming Competition] Ranked 1st in department, surpassing 81% of 163 teams.
•
[Debate Society PR Manager] Hosted national event; selected as Taiwan rep. in Cross-Straits Debate (Merit Award)
•
[Admin Intern of National Athletic Games] Supported TWD$20M sponsorship and $0.5M crowdfunding

Key Skills
Languages
•
English (TOEIC 910)
•
Mandarin (Native)
•
French (A2)

Technical Skills
•
Microsoft office (PPT , Word, Excel VBA)
•
Computing (C, C++, Python)
•
Networking technologies (Ethernet, SPE, APL)
Market Strategy & Value Proposition
•
Market Research
•
Proposal Development & Strategic Pitching
•
Product Marketing & GTM Planning
Technical Execution & Global Collaboration
•
Technology & Feasibility Assessment
•
Cross-Functional Project Coordination
•
Cross-Cultural Collaboration

Innovation Project Awards
ATCC Case Competition – 3rd Place / 400+ teams, 2020,
Taiwan’s largest intercollegiate case competition
•
Co-led a Container Rental System from ideation to pilot run, successfully pitched for corporate adoption.

Sinyi Proposal Competition – Best Proposal / 200+ teams, 2019
National case competition hosted by Sinyi Group (real estate)
•
Led a 5-member team to design an Apartment Rental solution, securing "Best Proposal" among 200+ teams.

career_objective.target_archetype: Strategic Product Builder / Early-stage Discovery PM
career_objective.target_trajectory: I want to become a strategy-driven, discovery-oriented product builder who defines problems in emerging market.
